title: [BUG] 对某一个列设置了style: { border}，位于这个列后的所有列都生效了。
author: zhiguow
body:
## 🐛 Bug Report

对某一个列设置了style: { border}，位于这个列后的所有列都生效了。

## Steps To Reproduce

<!-- The exact steps required to reproduce the issue, ideally with a code example -->

```javascript
const wb = new ExcelJS.Workbook();
const ws = wb.addWorksheet('XYZ');
ws.columns = [
     { header: '', key: 'myBorder', width: 20, style: { border: { right: {style:'double', color: {argb:'FFFF0000'}}, }, },},
     { header: '', key: '', width: 20,},
]
```

## The expected behaviour:
只对一个列的border完成style设置

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: [pr#1573](https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/pull/1573) seems to be talking about this problem, but has not been merged, after the merger should be able to solve the problem

comments.author: hoshyo
